_comment_results_file_id: results[].file_id is C++/Go scanner-ordering divergence: both binaries assign FileIDs sequentially during indexing but Go's filesystem-readdir order differs from C++'s scanner (priority desc, path asc). Path / line / column / match / score all match across runs; only the synthetic file_id integer is non-portable. Mask it so this descriptor verifies content rather than ID assignment.
_comment_sort_arrays: Go iterates the trigram-index map in hash-order so result order is non-deterministic. Sort by canonical content so the test verifies multiset equality.
